distance_m.description: Race distance in meters, for example 2140.

distance_m_1.description: First final distance in meters when separate qualifier groups feed different starts.

distance_m_2.description: Second final distance in meters when separate qualifier groups feed different starts.

distance_m_3.description: Third final distance in meters when separate qualifier groups feed different starts.

driver_age_limit.description: Maximum driver age used in youth-driver distance conditions, for example 18.

start_method.description: Start method from the Swedish source text.

breed_type.description: Race breed/category heading from proposition type U.

prop_title.description: Optional proposition title, usually a proper race or series name.

date_text.description: Source date wording for half-row allowance notices.

date_range_text.description: Source date-range wording used in final start-ban notices.

track_name.description: Track name used in short final and obligation notices.

meeting_number.description: Meeting number used in recurring DubbelCupen intros.

meeting_schedule.description: Comma-separated qualifier calendar used in recurring series intro rows.

selection_count.description: Count used in short priority clauses such as '2 enligt punkt 21'.

priority_group.description: Priority group text for FX priority notices.

home_horse_count.description: Number of home-track horses with priority.

home_track_aliases.description: Additional tracks that also count as home tracks in FX priority sentences.

selection_limit.description: Horse-count threshold used in EX selection-order sentences.

selection_order_basis.description: Selection basis used when too many horses are entered in an EX race.

stl_division.description: STL division label embedded in recurring start-point allocation clauses.

standings_url.description: Series standings URL used in short standings notices.

wildcard_authority.description: Track or organizer named in a wildcard clause.

wildcard_action.description: Authority verb phrase used in wildcard clauses.

har även möjlighet att dela ut.sv: har även möjlighet att dela ut

förbehåller sig rätten att dela ut.sv: förbehåller sig rätten att dela ut

wildcard_award_phrase.description: Wildcard quantity phrase from the source text.

wildcard_context.description: Optional trailing context in wildcard clauses.

i detta lopp, företrädesvis till häst i.sv: i detta lopp, företrädesvis till häst i träning i utlandet.
i detta lopp, företrädesvis till häst i.fi: tässä lähdössä, ensisijaisesti ulkomailla valmennuksessa olevalle hevoselle.
i detta lopp, företrädesvis till häst i.en: in this race, preferably to a horse trained abroad.

i detta lopp, företrädesvis till häst i.sv: i detta lopp, företrädesvis till häst i utländsk träning.
i detta lopp, företrädesvis till häst i.fi: tässä lähdössä, ensisijaisesti ulkomailla valmennetulle hevoselle.
i detta lopp, företrädesvis till häst i.en: in this race, preferably to a horse in foreign training.

i detta lopp, i första hand till utländ.sv: i detta lopp, i första hand till utländska ekipage.
i detta lopp, i första hand till utländ.en: in this race, primarily to foreign entries.

i detta lopp oavsett startpoäng..en: in this race regardless of start points.

wildcard_recipients.description: Named horses or entries that received a wildcard.

sponsor_name.description: Sponsor or race organizer name in honorary prize text.

title_prefix.description: Free-form branded or series prefix that precedes a reusable L race-title chain.

title_year.description: Four-digit year suffix used by recurring L title families such as branded B-trainer series names.

presented_by_name.description: Name shown in short L title rows that only say Presenteras av ...

driver_birth_date.description: Compact YYMMDD birth date threshold for drivers.

secondary_driver_race_limit.description: Second driver/rider race-count limit phrase used by malformed joined V clauses.

participant_role.description: Eligible V participant group for driver/rider birth rules.

driver_birth_date_start.description: Start of a compact YYMMDD birth date interval for V participants.

driver_birth_date_end.description: End of a compact YYMMDD birth date interval for V participants.

trainer_start_limit.description: Maximum number of starts made by a trainer during the referenced year.

trainer_start_year.description: Year used in trainer activity limit clauses.

training_code.description: Training code used in uninterrupted training clauses, usually A or B.

training_since_date.description: Compact YYMMDD date from uninterrupted training clauses.

eligibility_subject.description: General V eligibility subject phrase such as '2-åriga svenska (ej mockinländare)'.

eligibility_subject_secondary.description: Second V eligibility subject in compound range clauses joined by 'samt'.

eligibility_suffix.description: Eligibility suffix after a max/min/range clause, for example non-winner or licence-holder restrictions.

secondary_clause_suffix.description: Extra condition attached to the second clause in a compound V range sentence.

age_exact.description: Exact horse age for V clauses that apply to one age only.

amount_secondary_min_kr.description: Minimum earnings amount for the second subject in a compound V range clause.

amount_secondary_max_kr.description: Maximum earnings amount for the second subject in a compound V range clause.

amount_secondary_kr.description: Single earnings amount used by the second clause in a compound V sentence.

prize_ladder.description: Ordered prize amounts exactly as sourced, including parenthesized optional prizes.

amount_kr.description: Swedish krona amount exactly as sourced.

amount_kr_1.description: First Swedish krona threshold amount in a multi-threshold rule.

amount_kr_2.description: Second Swedish krona threshold amount in a multi-threshold rule.

amount_kr_3.description: Third Swedish krona threshold amount in a multi-threshold rule.

placed_count.description: Number of explicitly placed prize recipients.

premium_chance_percent.description: Extra prize percentage for premium-chance horses.

track_order.description: Comma-separated track draw order exactly as sourced.

allowance_text.description: Rendered allowance text built from parsed allowance segments.

allowance_segments.description: Structured allowance segments parsed from Tillägg terms.
